title: RevocationBatch
description: Privacy-preserving batched revocation. Instead of publishing status list updates immediately (which enables timing-correlation attacks), the system batches revocations and publishes at configurable intervals. Interval options: 1h, 6h, 24h.

credential_format.description: Format determines status list type: MDOC uses TSL (Token Status List), SD_JWT_VC uses Bitstring Status List

batch_interval.description: How frequently this batch is published. Lower intervals reduce revocation latency; higher intervals provide stronger timing-correlation resistance.

pending_credential_ids.description: Credentials queued in this batch, not yet published

status_list_uri.description: URI of the published status list after publication

scheduled_publish_at.description: When this batch is scheduled to publish
